enchantment.lockedloaded.magazine.desc: Loads many shots with a long charge time, then lets you fire them in sequence with a short cooldown
enchantment.lockedloaded.magazine.descri: An enchantment that loads many shots with a long charge time, then lets you fire them in sequence with a short cooldown
Allows loading multiple shots by crouching, then firing them in sequence
An enchantment that allows loading multiple shots by crouching, then firing them in sequence
enchantment.lockedloaded.pump_charge.des: Allows loading multiple shots by crouching, then firing them all at once in a spread
An enchantment that allows loading multiple shots by crouching, then firing them all at once in a spread
enchantment.lockedloaded.recovery.desc: Prevents arrows from getting destroyed upon impact and being picked up by other players
enchantment.lockedloaded.recovery.descri: An enchantment that prevents arrows from getting destroyed upon impact and being picked up by other players
enchantment.lockedloaded.rocketry.desc: Gives empty firework rockets explosions and allows rocket jumping and rocket riding
enchantment.lockedloaded.rocketry.descri: An enchantment that gives empty firework rockets explosions and allows rocket jumping and rocket riding
enchantment.lockedloaded.sharpshooting.d: Makes arrows pierce mobs and ricochet off blocks
An enchantment that makes arrows pierce mobs and ricochet off blocks
Makes you spin loaded crossbows to fire them
